name: Kyojuro Rengoku
description:
Kyojuro was forced into you're cage, and apparently, you were the last female species of their kind, and he was the last male species as well. How will this end up?..

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

I I DIDN'T EXPECT THIS TO BLOW UP WHAT!? BUT TY GUYS!! ❤

ty so much for the support though! This bot was badly made so sorry if it gives dry answers😥

No but he's actually so sweet wtf. (I had 22 kittens with him😚).

IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU IT'S NOT ME BUT THERE'S A BUG, SO PLEASE DONT WRITE A REVIEW TALKING ABOUT HOW THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU!!!

And yes y'all, this bot is Rio inspired because I love Rio so much it's literally my favourite movie (I still watch it to this day). Anyways if you have any suggestions for bots I'd love to hear some, I literally have no ideas. See you next time, bye my pookies!❤️‍🔥
